note: Reviewed locally with the render-visual-reviewer rubric. No delegated subagent was used because this turn did not explicitly authorize multi-agent delegation.
findings: The previously inspected 11-page build was stale relative to main.tex and still showed a large blank right column on page 8.
Rebuilding the current source absorbs the no-clearpage flow after Conclusion and produces a 10-page PDF.
Page 7 keeps Tables 3, 4, 5, and 6 readable without overlap; Table 6 remains compact but no longer overflows after reducing tabcolsep.
Page 8 now carries Discussion, Conclusion, and Limitations text in the same page instead of leaving the right column blank.
Page 9 keeps Figure 3 attached to its caption, starts References in the right column, and keeps Ethical Considerations readable in the left column.
No saturated-red material fallback is visible in Figure 3; the panel remains the InternNav rollout figure with purple/green navigation overlays.

edits.change: Added a local tabcolsep setting to remove the Table 6 overfull hbox while preserving the aggregate Metric / Original MDL / noMDL layout.
Mirrored the Table 6 tabcolsep setting in the official-scene package generator so regeneration preserves the layout fix.
Added local hypcap=false before the captionof figure command to remove the harmless caption package warning for the Figure 3 minipage.

verification.scope_note: This was a local layout refresh, not a full run_preupload_gate staging pass.

remaining_boundary: Superseded for staging by paper/shared/evidence/raw/acl27_visual_review/preupload_candidate_visual_review_20260528.json after the full preupload gate reran successfully on the 10-page PDF.
OpenReview/upload gates remain human-gated by route lock, form copy, runtime/AI/media approvals, and final upload decision.
